name: Concurrent Row Updates
description: Multiple threads repeatedly update the same rows, causing contention and demonstrating optimistic vs pessimistic locking behavior.

sql.sqlserver: UPDATE scenario_accounts SET balance = balance + 1 WHERE id = (SELECT TOP 1 id FROM scenario_accounts ORDER BY NEWID())
sql.postgres: UPDATE scenario_accounts SET balance = balance + 1 WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM scenario_accounts ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1)
